name: openEuler sig-epol SIG
description: Complementing the openEuler LTS and innovative version package repositories to provide the openEuler community with the richest possible packages.

name: openEuler sig-epol SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-epol SIG maintains 111 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-epol SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for Complementing the openEuler LTS and innovative version package repositories to provide the openEuler community with the richest possible packages.. The SIG has 14 core members and maintains 111 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-epol SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-epol SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-epol SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-epol SIG maintains 111 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-epol.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-epol SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-epol SIG has 2 Maintainers, including: xiasenlin, hufeng. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
